name: Chocolate Mint Baked Alaska
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the melted mint-chocolate chips and butter in a bowl. Stir until smooth, then add chocolate wafer crumbs and stir again until well combined. Press into the bottom of a 9-inch springform pan and freeze until firm.
2. In another bowl, combine the remaining mint-chocolate chips, corn syrup, and heavy cream. Stir until the chips are melted and the mixture is smooth. Let it cool to room temperature.
3. In a large bowl, whip the softened ice cream until smooth but not melted. Gradually stir in the chocolate mixture (some flecks will appear). Place into the center of the crust, forming a mound with about 3/4-inch edge around.
4. Freeze until firm. Remove the sides of the pan and preheat the oven to 450°F.
5. In a large bowl, beat egg whites and cream of tartar until soft peaks form. Gradually add sugar while continuing to beat until stiff peaks form. Spread the meringue over the ice cream and crust, swirling for decoration.
6. Bake at 450°F for 4-6 minutes or until lightly browned. Serve immediately!
